steps.title: Set up the division
steps.content:
To convert inches to yards, divide by the conversion factor 36 (since 1 yard = 36 inches):
$$\frac{1,116}{36}$$

steps.title: Evaluate the division
steps.content:
Calculating the result:
$$\frac{1,116}{36} = 31$$
Therefore, 31 yards is the answer.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $31$. It's given that $1$ yard is equal to $36$ inches. Therefore, $1,116$ inches is equivalent to $\left(1,116\text{inches}\right)\left(\frac{1\text{yard}}{36\text{inches}}\right)$, or $31$ yards.
